untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'event day' - no event calendar indicator available; (2) identification of 'historic continuation pattern' - requires pattern matching/ML not available in indicator set; (3) 'predetermined number of days based on lag pattern' - requires dynamic lag analysis not in allowed indicators. Used price_pos_20 as proxy for 'upper 20% of range' and generic stop-loss, but core logic is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Partially translated using price_pos_20 (0-1 scale, where >0.8 approximates upper 20%).
